import React from 'react' import {Col} from "react-bootstrap" import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' import {Fade} from "react-awesome-reveal" const CardMovie = ({movie}) => { return (

Movie Name:{movie.original_title}

Release Data:{movie.release_date}

Rate Counts:{movie.vote_count}

Rate :{movie.vote_average}

 ) } export default CardMovie
